name: visualize
description: Build single-file, low-commitment interactive HTML as scaffolding for the conversation — comparison grids, plans, dashboards, draggable kanbans, decision matrices, annotated architectures — when the answer wants to be a page you can scroll, click, and share. Mermaid, SVG, and charts are primitives inside. Every editable artifact ends with a 'Copy state as JSON' button so the work flows back into chat.
